name: Air Combat: Jet Fighter
description: Get ready for adrenaline-pumping aerial battles in Air Combat: Jet Fighter. Take control of advanced jets and dominate the skies in thrilling dogfights and air strike missions. Test your flying skills across multiple combat modes, unlock powerful aircraft, and unleash missiles on enemies. With stunning 3D graphics, smooth controls, cinematic effects, and intense sky battles, experience the ultimate modern air combat. Lead your squadron, crush enemy forces, and become the ace of the skies!
instructions: Mouse control and WASD to move and L OR Shift to fire
